module.name: tree
module.description: Hierarchy / tree diagram from a nested bullet list. Top-down org chart (default) or a left-to-right indented tree.
module.aiSpec:
Draw a HIERARCHY / TREE DIAGRAM (org chart, taxonomy, decision tree, file hierarchy). Block module whose BODY is a nested Markdown bullet list — indentation sets the parent/child levels:
<!-- @tree layout: updown --> - Root - Child A - Leaf 1 - Leaf 2 - Child B <!-- @end -->
layout: `updown` (default) = top-down org chart with connector lines; `right` = left-to-right indented tree (file-explorer style). `color` sets the connector / border colour. Node labels are plain text. Multiple top-level bullets render as a forest. Keep labels short so the chart fits the slide (check with measure_slides).

snippet.label: Tree — org chart
snippet.text: <!-- @tree layout: updown --> - Company - Engineering - Frontend - Backend - Design - Sales <!-- @end -->
snippet.description: Top-down hierarchy diagram from a nested list (indent = level).

snippet.label: Tree — indented
snippet.text: <!-- @tree layout: right --> - Root - Branch A - Leaf - Branch B <!-- @end -->
